column2: Find and activate the 4 portal switches
Finish looting then use the portal to return to Arcadia Station. This task will autocomplete in 30 seconds.
Finish looting then use the portal to return to Arcadia Station

[b][c][dd08d6]Hall of Champions [-][/c][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][ffffff]| [-][/c][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][dd08d6]Planet Nyxara Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]Arcadia's signature virtual reality destination. Endure 3 tests of wit and strength to gain champion status and collect OP Arcadia rewards.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c]
Look around for a way down into the temple's lower levels
Walk over to the resort manager

[b][c][ff0000]Congratulations Champion [-][/c]
[c][ff0000]Where those who came before perished, you have prevailed and emerged victorious.[-][/c]
[c][ff0000]From now onward, you are officially recognized as a Champion of Arcadia.[-][/c][/b]
[c][c800ff][b]Collect your suitable reward ahead![/b][-][/c]
Find and activate the 4 portal switches
[c][04ecdd]Arcadian archeologists have gone missing and project timeframes have stalled.\nWe're counting on you to get in there, find them, and ensure the project gets back on track.[-][/c]

[b][c][04ecdd]Expedition [-][/c][c][ff8800][-][/c][/b][b][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][ffffff]| [-][/c][/b][b][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][04ecdd]Planet Aethon Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]An Arcadian expedition team has not checked in and we fear our investment will not yield returns. The research project team's last known location was the site of a strange alien temple. We need you to head to the temple, reestablish contact with the team, and ensure the project is on track.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c][c][1083fe][-][/c]
Open the door to the base
[c][00ffcc]We're headed to the exit now. Feel free to grab anything you see laying around in housekeeping, then head back to Arcadia Station through the emergency exit. Thanks for your help.[-][/c]
Finish looting then use the portal to return to Arcadia Station
[b][c][ff0000]No turning back now. Onwards. Your 3 challenges await.[-][/c][/b]
Collect your loot and use the emergency exit portal
Open the door to the base
[c][04ecdd]We need to find out what happened to the expedition party, and recover any technology caches that may exist.\nHow did they get inside? Take a look.[-][/c]
Collect your loot and exit the portal
Collect your loot and exit the portal. This task will autocomplete in 30 seconds.
Find a way to power up the radio

[c][d1e916][b](Your Comms Buzz)[/b][-][/c]\n[c][d1e916]This is the expedition party. Come in. [-][/c][c][00ffcc][-][/c][c][d1e916]We're hiding in the exit portal room behind the pillars.[-][/c]\n[c][c2c2c2](locate the expedition leader)[-][/c]
Walk over to the resort manager
Take the exit portal back to Arcadia Station.

[c][ffffff](the radio comes online. the resort manager contacts you a moment later)[-][/c]
[c][00ffcc][b]You did it! great! Now I'll try to raise the maintenance team.[/b][-][/c]
[c][00ffcc][b][i]Maintenance team, come in, this is Arcadia Resort.[/i][/b][-][/c]
[c][ffffff](a few moments later the radio clicks)[-][/c][c][c800ff][b]
This is the maintenance team commander, we are arriving to your location now. [/b][-][/c]
[c][c800ff][b]Your scheduled repairs will begin momentarily.[/b][-][/c]
Search the tunnels for a way into the base
Search the tunnels for a way into the base
[c][00ffcc]Looks like maybe a way out.[-][/c]\n[c][04ecdd]Maybe the expedition party is down here.[-][/c]
Flip the switch in the center of the room once you're sufficiently ready to die
[c][dd08d6]Have a look around for any rare loot before exiting through the portal.[-][/c]
Access the Bugtron AI. Shut down the Bugtrons.
Find a way to power up the radio
Free up power capacity. We're gonna have to turn some stuff off.
Find and activate the 4 portal switches
Walk over to the resort manager
[c][dd08d6]It looks like there are 4 power circuits that need to be switched on before this portal will turn on. Find the switches in the base.[-][/c]
Find the emergency exit. Check housekeeping.
[c][ff8800]Alright, found a way in. It looks dark - like it's been in standby mode for a thousand years.[-][/c]

[b][c][04ecdd]Arcadia Resort [-][/c][/b][b][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][ffffff]| [-][/c][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][04ecdd]Planet Aethon Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]Arcadian maintenance crews have really let the resort go downhill as of late. We need your help clearing the unwelcome infestation and getting Arcadia employees safely evacuated.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c][c][1083fe][-][/c]
Collect your loot and use the emergency exit portal. This task will autocomplete in 30 seconds.
Walk on over to that lever over there. When you're ready, flip it.

[c][dd08d6][b]Welcome to the Hall of Champions [/b][-][/c]
[c][ffffff]Three challenges of wits, strength, and luck await you. Will you be victorious and earn significant rewards while gaining champion status?[-][/c]
[b][c][ff0000]You're gonna wanna bring a lot of firepower to this one. [-][/c][/b]
[b][c][c800ff]And a lot of health packs.[-][/c][/b]
[c][dd08d6]The tunnels, recently discovered during excavation, contain the preserved remnants of an ancient high technology race.[-][/c]
Collect your loot and use the emergency exit portal
[c][d1e916]Hey, thanks for saving us. Go on ahead to Arcadia Station and let them know we're okay. Now that you've cleared the place out, we can get our project back on track.[-][/c]

[c][00ffcc]Alright, you heard what the man said. Head over to housekeeping and be sure to clear a path for the rest of us. Let me know when you find the emergency exit and when it's safe for the rest of us to evacuate.[-][/c]
[c][dd08d6]Most of the teams sent were wiped out. A single survivor reported lethal security systems turning on at random. [-][/c][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][dd08d6]Better keep an eye out for traps.[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd]That did it. You should be able to get into the inner facility now.\nWe don't know what lies ahead, but our expedition team indicated the existence of valuable technology caches.[-][/c]
Find a way to unlock the door to the base

[b][c][dd08d6]Syndicate Bunker [-][/c][c][ff8800][-][/c][/b][b][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][ffffff]| [-][/c][/b][b][c][dd08d6]Planet Nyxara Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]Arcadia archeologists stumbled upon an ancient robotics tunnel base filled with long dormant Robotics Syndicate tech! Thus far, all teams sent in to recover the goods have gone missing.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c][c][1083fe][-][/c]
[b][c][ff0000]Take a look around. It's safe. For now.[-][/c][/b]\n[b][c][ff0000]When you're ready, flip the switch to begin.[-][/c][/b]
Find a way to power up the radio. There's probably a switch around here.
Search the tunnels for a way into the base
[c][04ecdd]Great, you're in.\nThe temple looks remarkably intact for it's age. Looks like some advanced tech.[-][/c]
Find a way to unlock the door to the base
Find a way down to the main level of the temple
Open the door to the base
[c][dd08d6]There should be an exit portal within the base, but who knows if it's still powered after all this time. Keep an eye out for it.[-][/c]
Collect your loot and exit the portal
[c][dd08d6]That should do it. Head back up to the portal room.[-][/c]
Find a way to unlock the door to the base
[c][dd08d6]Look for a way into the main base.[-][/c]

[b][c][04ecdd]Syndicate Business Center [-][/c][/b][b][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][ffffff]|[-][/c][/b][b][c][04ecdd] Planet Aethon Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]We've identified a facility the Robotics Syndicate is using as a front. We don't know what they're up to in there, but we need to get in, find out, and shut it down.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c][c][1083fe][-][/c]

[c][04ecdd]Arcadian Intelligence needs to know on what's going on at the business center, a suspected Syndicate front.\nWe've secured a credential for you which should get you past security.\nYou're going in as a[-][/c][c][ecf000] Power Optimization Consultant[-][/c][c][04ecdd], so when you check-in, tell them you're there to analyze their grid.[-][/c]
Finish Checking In - Speak with the receptionist
[c][04ecdd](your radio buzzes)\nAlright you're in. Take a look around the facility. See if you can figure out what's going on here.[-][/c]

[c][04ecdd](your radio buzzes)\nThis isn't a business center at all. It looks like some type of signal intelligence facility used for hacking or engaging in fraudulent trade.\nSee if you can shut it down quietly.[-][/c]
Talk to the lab worker in Raptor Inc lobby
Talk to the lab worker in Raptor Inc lobby
Talk to the lab worker in Raptor Inc lobby
Stand on the red square to be scanned.
Gain entry to the storage room
Gain entry to the storage room
Gain entry to the storage room
Loot the facility. Find all the containers.
[c][04ecdd]Inside this storage room you should find controls to unlock the elevator. We need to stabilize the grid before we can bring the replicators offline to avoid the facility exploding.[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd]Go stand on the red square over there to be scanned in. It will only take a few moments. Once complete, the teleporter will power on and you can use it to enter the inner lab.[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd]Ok, it looks like the replicators are still going haywire. There's no way around it, you're going to have to go through those raptors to gain entrance to the medbay.[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd]If you take any damage from the raptors, you can come back to the medbay to heal up. You're going to need to find a way into the storage room next.[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd]Okay great. At the top of this elevator you'll find the voltage controls.[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd]Excellent. Power has been re-routed to the control room. You should be able to find a way in now. Look for the replicator shutoff switch.[-][/c]

[c][04ecdd]Ok, that should prevent any new raptors for being created. Now to be safe, we need to bring the entire facility offline so our maintenance crews can safely enter the facility to perform repairs. Flip the master override switch in the facility. Take out any remaining raptors you encounter.[-][/c]

[c][04ecdd]Oh man, I didn't think you could do it. Thank you, it looks like the power fluctuations have subsided. Feel free to grab any loot you find in the facility. Come back up to the lobby once you've finished.[-][/c]

[b][c][ffffff]ArcadiaVR Entertainment [-][/c][/b]\n[c][ecf000]Activate PDA mission before entering the mission portals.[-][/c][c][0088ff] Portals are located at Arcadia Station.[-][/c][c][0088ff] These missions are repeatable and can be activated anytime via PDA. [-][/c]\n[c][0088ff]Earn [-][/c][c][ff0000][b]CacheKeys[/b][-][/c][c][0088ff] and [-][/c][c][db00c9][b]ChampionKeys[/b][-][/c][c][0088ff] as well as other rewards for VR Sims successfully completed.[-][/c]

[b][c][ecf000]Royal Flush [-][/c][c][ffffff]| [-][/c][c][ecf000][-][/c][/b][b][c][ecf000]Planet Shangri-La Sim[-][/c][/b]
[c][1083fe]Arcadia listening stations have intercepted some disturbing chatter on Syndicate frequencies. [-][/c]
[c][1083fe]It sounds like something big. You're headed to Syndicate City to investigate codename "Royal Flush".[-][/c]
[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c]

[b][c][04ecdd]Temple of Harvest [-][/c][/b][b][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][ffffff]|[-][/c][/b][b][c][04ecdd] Planet Aethon Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]Unravel the mysteries of the temple while discovering the hidden advanced technologies within.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c][c][1083fe][-][/c]
Explore the temple. Look for a way deeper into the temple.
Finish looting and exit the portal
Finish looting and exit the portal
Finish looting and exit the portal
Finish looting and exit the portal
Finish looting and exit the portal
Finish looting and exit the portal. Return to Adelevine Commons.

[b][c][04ecdd]Vault of the Doomed [-][/c][/b][b][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][ffffff]|[-][/c][/b][b][c][04ecdd] Planet Aethon Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]Unravel the mysteries of the vault and discover the many treasures and dangers within.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c][c][1083fe][-][/c]

[b][c][04ecdd]Raptor Inc [-][/c][/b][b][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][ffffff]|[-][/c][/b][b][c][04ecdd] Planet Aethon Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]We've received an emergency request to help re-stabilize Raptor Inc's power grid. Please get to the facility and speak with the lab worker.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c][c][1083fe][-][/c]

[b][c][04ecdd]Mission Update[-][/c][/b]
[c][04ecdd]You've located [-][/c][c][ecf000]Syndicate City[-][/c][c][04ecdd].[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd]The marketplace level in the upper pyramids should be safe. Have a look around. [-][/c]
[c][04ecdd]You're investigating criminal code word: [-][/c][c][ecf000]Royal Flush[-][/c]

[b][c][04ecdd]Mission Update[-][/c][/b]\n[c][04ecdd]Huh, I guess [-][/c][c][ecf000]Royal Flush[-][/c][c][04ecdd] is just what they call their crapper.[-][/c]\n[c][04ecdd]Since you're there, give it a proper use. We need to be thorough in our investigation.[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd][b]Mission Update[/b]\nI'm picking up new signal anomalies directly below your location.\nCheck the plumbing.[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd][b]Mission Update[/b]\nLooks like some type of hidden manufacturing facility.\nAre those BugTrons? That's some really old robotics tech.[-][/c]

[c][04ecdd][b]Mission Update[/b]
They ARE BugTrons! Didn't think any of those existed after alpha 12.
The Syndicate could create a huge headache for Arcadia with these.[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd]You're going to have to shut them down. [-][/c]
[c][04ecdd][b]Mission Update[/b]\nIf you can't hack the systems, the BugTrons can still be shut down manually.\nYou'll have to get inside of them and look for the switch.[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd]No more BugTron energy signatures detected.\nI think the safest bet will be to take out the city core so they can't bring them back online.[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd][b]Mission Update[/b]\nExcellent. That should have opened access to the city core.\nProceed with taking out the core.[-][/c]

[c][04ecdd][b]You've discovered the ancient Talon Temple of Harvest.
Look for a way into the temple's underground caverns.
We intercepted Talon chiefs discussing ancient AI technology at this location.[/b]
[b]Arcadian higher ups want to get their hands on it.[/b][-][/c]
[c][04ecdd][b]There's the AI interface.[/b]\n[b]You need to bring it offline so Arcadian scientists can safely exfiltrate the data.[/b][-][/c]
[c][04ecdd][b]That should have done it.\nDispatching Arcadian scientists to your location.\nGo on ahead to see if you can find a better way in for them.[/b][-][/c]
[c][04ecdd][b]Perfect. The science team will enter here.\nProceed to the exit portal, but don't forget the loot![/b][-][/c]

[b][c][ff0000]Red [-][/c][c][ff0000]Water [-][/c][c][ffffff]| [-][/c][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][ecf000]Planet Shangri-La Sim[-][/c][/b]
[c][1083fe]Zirax distillers are urgently searching out a new recipe after several failed batches of their notoriously horrible brew. [-][/c]
[c][1083fe]Desperate times call for desperate measures.[-][/c]
[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c]

[c][ff0000][b]Zirax Command[/b][-][/c]
[c][a30000][b]*Unencrypted Message*[/b][-][/c]
Our drinks are no longer popular and aren't selling. We weighed some options, like killing anyone who leaves us bad reviews. 
After much deliberation it was decided maximum profit could be achieved via rebranding with a new recipe. 
Now we just need to find a recipe. You'll help us with this. We'll be in touch shortly.
Speak with the Zirax agent at the Inferno Club

[c][ff8800][b]Club Manager[/b][-][/c]
[c][ff8800]Thanks for cleaning up down there. Enjoy the loot. 
I've got a lead on a recipe. Head over to TOP Brewery and check in with the local brew master, Ulfric.
I'm told he's a disgruntled worker who might be persuaded to give up the TOP recipe.[-][/c]

[c][ff0000][b]Zirax Command[/b][-][/c]
[c][a30000][b]*Unencrypted Message*[/b][-][/c]
Head over to the Inferno Club and speak with our inside operative in club management. 
They should know how we can get our hands on a new brewing recipe.
[c][04ecdd][b]Operations Manager[/b]\nWhat are you doing over there? \nSecurity, [i]intruder[/i]![-][/c]
[c][ecf000][b]Ulfric[/b]\nCrap! We're about to be under heavy attack!\nDefend me! I must complete the brewing process![-][/c]

[b][c][a30000]Multiple troops inbound to the loading docks.[-][/c]\n[c][a30000]Take cover and defend TOP Brewery against the attack.[-][/c][/b]\n[c][ababab](The first wave will arrive in 30 seconds)[-][/c]

[c][ecf000][b]Ulfric[/b]
Thanks for buying me some time. And saving my life. 
Here, I've finished the new batch. It's [i]terrible[/i]! Ha![-][/c]
[c][ffffff](Write down Ulfric's recipe on a [i]PastyNote[/i]™)[-][/c]
[c][ecf000][b]Ulfric[/b]\nHey, there's a switch up above me. Check the hidden compartment.\nIt's only right I give you some primo brews from my private stash.[-][/c]

[b][c][ecf000]PirateNet [-][/c][c][ffffff]|[-][/c][/b][b][c][ecf000] Planet Shangri-La Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]We need an agent saboteur to ensure Arcadia IP doesn't end up in the hands of the competition. The Pirates have threatened to leak our private database on PirateNet.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c]
Speak with the Talon fishing boat captains

[b][c][ecf000]Syndicate Lab [-][/c][c][ffffff]|[-][/c][/b][b][c][ecf000] Planet Shangri-La Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]Rumors are spreading fast about a nearby facility - something is wrong, and we need to get eyes in there. Investigate Syndicate Lab and find out what they’re doing. [-][/c][c][1083fe]The situation may be dangerous and unpredictable so seek out any local contacts for intel, then act fast once you know what you’re dealing with.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c]
Finish looting and exit the facility
Finish looting and exit the facility

Find a way to access the lower levels
Find a way to access the lower levels

Gain access to the core room
Gain access to the core room

[b][c][ecf000]Prison Break [-][/c][c][ffffff]|[-][/c][/b][b][c][ecf000] Planet Shangri-La Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]Enemy forces are transporting a VIP to maximum security. Intercept the convoy and attempt to recue the VIP en-route. If interception is unsuccessful, proceed directly to the prison and attempt VIP extraction.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c][c][1083fe][-][/c]

[b][c][04ecdd]Syndicate Lair [-][/c][/b][b][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][ffffff]|[-][/c][/b][b][c][04ecdd] Planet Aethon Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]The evil robotics syndicate is performing horrible science experiments within their lair. You need to go in and carefully navigate the robotics of the facility while taking out any threats and acquiring any valuable loot.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c]

[b][c][ff8800]Legacy Dreadnaught [-][/c][c][ffffff]|[-][/c][c][ff8800] Arcadia Space Sim[-][/c][/b]
[c][1083fe]A NEW Arcadia VR Simulation. UCH has successfully EMP'd an Infested Dreadnaught.[-][/c]
[c][1083fe]The power situation is still highly unstable. You're going in to attempt to stabilize, then take control of the ship and salvage high value tech.[-][/c]
[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c]

[b][c][ecf000]Abandoned Pyramid [-][/c][c][ffffff]|[-][/c][/b][b][c][ecf000] Planet Shangri-La Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]Pirate smugglers were overheard cursing up a storm - apparently they lost half their squad while attempting to exfiltrate a haul of gold from an Abandoned Pyramid. [-][/c][c][1083fe]They’re packing up what they can and loading their craft - trying to get off-planet before the next problem finds them.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c]

[c][ff8800][b]DeathMart [/b][-][/c][b][c][ff8800][-][/c][c][ffffff]|[-][/c][c][ff8800] Arcadia Space Sim[-][/c][/b]
[c][ffffff](COMING SOON)[-][/c]
[c][1083fe]A NEW Arcadia VR Simulation. The Zirax have invaded FreshMart![-][/c]
[c][1083fe]The workers have barricaded themselves and are awaiting rescue.[-][/c]
[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c]
[c][1083fe]ArcadiaVR engineers are still working on this sim and it will be released soon![-][/c]\n[c][1083fe]You can use the sim, but it's not connected to PDA or leaderboards yet.[-][/c]

[b][c][00ff88]The Arena [-][/c][c][04ecdd][-][/c][c][ffffff]| [-][/c][c][04ecdd][-][/c][c][00ff88]Planet Medusa Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]A NEW Arcadia VR Simulation. Brawl it out ad gladiatorium in the Talon tribal arena.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c]

[b][c][00ff88][i][b]Infested [/b][/i]Deep Mine [-][/c][c][ffffff]|[-][/c][c][00ff88] Planet Medusa Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]A NEW Arcadia VR Simulation. The mine's laser recently uncovered what appear to be Legacy caverns and the crew pulled out. You're to get in there and investigate and eliminate any threats so mining operations can resume.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c]

[b][c][00ff88][i][b]Infested [/b][/i]Mine [-][/c][c][ffffff]| [-][/c][c][04ecdd][-][/c][c][00ff88]Planet Medusa Sim[-][/c][/b]\n[c][1083fe]A NEW Arcadia VR Simulation. A cryogenic gas leak has suspended mining operations after the legacy were attracted to the toxic gasses. The crew pulled out last week. We're sending you to get the place cleaned up.[-][/c]\n[c][9da805](Activate via PDA)[-][/c]

[b][c][ffffff]ArcadiaVR Tutorial[-][/c][/b]
[c][0088ff]To get started with Arcadia[-][/c][c][ecf000][-][/c]
[c][ecf000]Visit Arcadia Station [-][/c][c][969696](Alpha)[-][/c]
[c][ffffff]PDA(F1)->Solo Missions->Activate VR Arcade missions[-][/c]
[c][0088ff]Arcade VR Portals are located at Arcadia Station.[-][/c][c][0088ff] These missions are repeatable and can be activated anytime via PDA(F1). 4 hour cooldown. Activate missions prior to entering portals.[-][/c]
[c][0088ff]Earn [-][/c][c][ff0000][b]CacheKeys[/b][-][/c][c][0088ff] and [-][/c][c][db00c9][b]ChampionKeys[/b][-][/c][c][0088ff] as well as other rewards for VR Sims successfully completed.
Redeem at the Arcadia Cache portal on the arcade lower level.[-][/c]
Find a way into the mine
Find a way into the mine

[b][c][ffffff]Arcadia Station[-][/c][/b]\n[c][0088ff]Arcadia Station is the premier entertainment destination for galactic VR enthusiasts. Visit the station in the Alpha system to play VR simulations and compete with galactic gamers on the Arcadia leaderboards.[-][/c]

[b][c][ffffff]VR Planets[-][/c][/b]
[c][04ecdd]VR Planet Aethon [-][/c]
[c][00ff88]VR Planet Medusa [-][/c]
[c][ecf000]VR Planet Shangri-La [-][/c]
[c][dd08d6]VR Planet Nyxara[-][/c][c][ecf000][-][/c][c][00ff88][-][/c][c][04ecdd][-][/c]

[b][c][ffffff]Arcade VR Portals[-][/c][/b]\n[c][0088ff]The portals on Arcadia Station teleport players to virtual reality instance playfields which contain mission objectives in the PDA (F1). Activate missions in PDA prior to entering portals. Earn rewards and rep while climbing the Arcadia leaderboards by completing Arcadia VR PDA missions.[-][/c]
[c][04ecdd]Welcome to Arcadia Resort. It's seen better days.[-][/c]
